title: West to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conference
text: EXTON, Pa. , Sept. 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. (NYSE: WST), a global leader in innovative solutions for injectable drug administration, today announced that it will present at Bank of America Global Healthcare Conference in London, UK on Thursday, September 14, 2023 at 10:50 AM BST.
